name: wptechnix/wp-plugin-boilerplate-tools
description: Development tooling for the WPTechnix WordPress Plugin Boilerplate.

scripts-descriptions.phpcs: Checks code against WordPress coding standards.
scripts-descriptions.phpstan: Runs static analysis on the codebase.
scripts-descriptions.lint: Runs full code quality checks (PHPCBF, PHPCS, PHPStan).
scripts-descriptions.test:unit: Runs the Brain Monkey unit test suite (no WordPress).
scripts-descriptions.test:integration: Runs the WordPress integration test suite (real DB).
scripts-descriptions.test: Runs both the unit and integration test suites.
